rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference (10.1509/jmkr.45.2.226) with no in-text citation context, title string, or surrounding sentence, so it is hard to verify whether usage is incidental. The two papers do share grocery-pricing and matched survey/purchase-data themes (price search behavior vs. store price image formation), which makes substantive use plausible but not demonstrated from current evidence.
